title: GameState
description: Complete game state schema for WorldArchitect.AI tabletop RPG platform

Stats.description: Allows additional properties for legacy/test data compatibility

strength.description: Physical power, melee attack/damage modifier (unbounded for epic levels)

dexterity.description: Agility, ranged attacks, AC, initiative (unbounded for epic levels)

constitution.description: Endurance, hit points, concentration saves (unbounded for epic levels)

intelligence.description: Reasoning, memory, wizard spellcasting (unbounded for epic levels)

wisdom.description: Perception, insight, cleric/druid spellcasting (unbounded for epic levels)

charisma.description: Force of personality, bard/warlock/sorcerer spellcasting (unbounded for epic levels)

HealthStatus.description: Character health tracking including temporary HP and conditions

death_saves.description: Death saving throw tracking when at 0 HP

EntityStatus.description: Current status of an entity (string canonical; array accepted for backward compatibility)

Character.description: Base character model for PCs and NPCs

display_name.description: Name shown in narrative and UI

mbti.description: MBTI personality type or creative personality descriptor

alignment.description: D&D alignment or creative moral descriptor

level.description: Character level (1-20: standard, 21-25: divine, 26-30: sovereign, 31+: epic)

name.description: Legacy field - character name (use display_name for new campaigns)

hp_current.description: Legacy field - current HP (use health.hp for new campaigns)

hp_max.description: Legacy field - maximum HP (use health.hp_max for new campaigns)

xp.description: Legacy field - experience points (use experience.current for new campaigns)

attributes.description: Runtime alias for stats - D&D ability scores (strength, dexterity, etc.)

equipped_items.description: Legacy alias: use equipment for all new campaigns. Preserved for backward compatibility with sessions created before equipment unification.

equipment.description: Canonical equipment field: slot -> item map plus backpack array. Use this for all equipment (main_hand, off_hand, armor, head, ring_1, ring_2, etc.)

spells_known.description: Known spells for fixed-list casters (Sorcerer, Warlock, Bard, Ranger). Each item: {name, level, description}.

spells_prepared.description: Today's prepared spells for prepared-caster classes (Wizard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Artificer). Each item: {name, level, description}. Distinct from spells_known.

active_effects.description: Temporary magical or mechanical effects on the player character

combat_stats.description: Initiative/speed/passive metrics and other combat-related stats

core_memories.description: Important memories that define this character

cantrips.description: Cantrips known by this character (at-will spells, no slot required). Supports legacy string format or object format with {name, level, description}.

spells.description: Character's spells list (alias for spells_known for LLM compatibility)

anyOf.description: Legacy format: XP as direct integer

experience.description: XP tracking (supports legacy int and modern object formats)

cantrips.description: Cantrips known (at-will spells, no slot required). Accepts legacy string or modern {name, ...} object.

resources.description: Class resources: spell slots, ki points, rage uses, etc.

attitude_to_party.description: Current narrative attitude toward the party

Location.description: A game location that can contain entities

entities_present.description: Entity IDs of entities currently here

FactionUnits.description: Military units in the faction minigame

spies.description: Intel units: 0.5x FP each, enable intel operations

elites.description: Elite units: 3x FP each, require level 6+ adventurers

elite_avg_level.description: Average level of elite unit adventurers

gold.description: Gold pieces for recruitment and operations

FactionMinigame.description: Turn-based faction strategy mini-game state. Allows players to manage their faction's military and political power.

enabled.description: Whether faction minigame is active for this campaign

tutorial_completed.description: Whether player has completed faction tutorial

turn_number.description: Current faction turn (advances with in-game time)

ranking.description: Faction ranking among all factions (1 = strongest)

GodModeDirective.description: A player-defined rule for god mode (narrative control)

added.description: ISO timestamp when rule was added

ArcMilestone.description: Tracks completion of a narrative arc milestone

notes.description: Optional notes about how it was achieved

CampaignTier.description: Campaign power tier. Mortal (levels 1-10), Divine (11-17, deity interactions), Sovereign (18-20, multiverse-scale)

CustomCampaignState.description: Campaign-specific state beyond core D&D mechanics. This is the primary extension point for WorldArchitect-specific features.

next_companion_arc_turn.description: Turn number when next companion arc event triggers

success_streak.description: Consecutive significant successes without major setbacks (used for complication probability).

active_constraints.description: Player-defined OOC constraints (e.g., 'keep my backstory secret from other players')

core_memories.description: Persistent core memory snippets used for context continuity.

last_location.description: Last resolved location name from story mode used for continuity and UI fallback.

last_story_mode_sequence_id.description: Last persisted story-mode sequence id for state synchronization across flows.

world_events.description: Nested living-world event payload preserved under custom campaign state for compatibility.

attribute_system.description: Which attribute system to use (standard, point_buy, etc.)

divine_potential.description: Divine potential points (used for divine tier upgrades)

universe_control.description: Universe control points (used for sovereign tier)

divine_upgrade_available.description: Whether player can upgrade to divine tier

multiverse_upgrade_available.description: Whether player can upgrade to sovereign/multiverse tier

active_missions.description: Currently active mission tracking (supports legacy string and modern object formats)

character_creation_in_progress.description: Whether character creation wizard is active

character_creation_completed.description: Whether character creation has been completed

level_up_pending.description: Legacy level-up pending flag used for routing

level_up_in_progress.description: Whether level-up flow is actively in progress

level_up_cancelled.description: Legacy marker that level-up flow was cancelled

level_up_complete.description: Legacy marker that level-up flow completed

sanctuary_mode.description: Sanctuary mode state - activates after quest/mission completion

budget_warnings_shown.description: Persist keys for budget warnings already shown to user

player_character_data_extras.description: Non-canonical player_character_data fields migrated for backward compatibility

type.description: Role in combat (enemy, ally, companion, pc, unknown)

has_acted.description: Whether this combatant has acted this round

concentration_spell.description: Name of spell being concentrated on, if any

combat_session_id.description: Unique identifier for the current combat session

round_number.description: Current combat round (1-indexed when in combat)

initiative_order.description: Ordered list of characters by initiative (supports entity ID strings and legacy entry objects)

active_combatant.description: Entity ID of combatant whose turn it is

combat_summary.description: Summary of combat for narrative generation

rewards_processed.description: Administrative flag indicating combat rewards were already processed

encounter_type.description: Type of encounter (heist, social, stealth, etc.)

xp_awarded.description: XP awarded from this reward source

microsecond.description: Microseconds (0-999999) for precise time tracking in Think Mode

time_of_day.description: Narrative time of day descriptor (accepts both lowercase and Title Case for backward compatibility)

anyOf.description: Legacy format: location as object with name property

current_location.description: Party's current location (string ID or legacy object format)

SocialHPChallenge.description: Progress tracking for social persuasion encounters

ActionResolution.description: Mechanical audit trail for player actions

PlanningChoice.description: A specific course of action available to the player

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this choice entails

cons.description: List of potential risks or downsides

risk_level.description: Danger level associated with this choice

switch_to_story_mode.description: If true, selecting this switches UI to character/story mode

freeze_time.description: If true, selecting this choice freezes in-game time advancement

PlanningChoiceLegacy.description: Legacy planning choice without embedded id (use map key as id).

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this choice entails

cons.description: List of potential risks or downsides

risk_level.description: Danger level associated with this choice

switch_to_story_mode.description: If true, selecting this switches UI to character/story mode

freeze_time.description: If true, selecting this choice freezes in-game time advancement

SanctuaryMode.description: Sanctuary mode state - activates after quest/mission completion

active.description: Whether sanctuary mode is currently active

broken.description: Whether sanctuary was broken by player aggression

PlanningBlock.description: Structured planning and decision-making block (Think Mode)

choice_id.description: Short identifier for the chosen choice

chosen_choice.description: Detailed explanation of the chosen path

choices.description: Planning choices as an ordered list or an id-keyed map.

plan_quality.description: Assessment of plan quality based on intelligence/wisdom check

quality_tier.description: Tier: Confused, Muddled, Incomplete, Competent, Sharp, Brilliant, Masterful

effect.description: Description of how quality affects the plan options

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for the current game session

turn_number.description: Current turn number in the campaign

player_character_data.description: Primary player character (null during early initialization)

last_state_update_timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of last state modification

last_living_world_turn.description: Last player turn when living world events were generated

last_living_world_time.description: World time snapshot of last living world generation

player_turn.description: Total player turns taken in this campaign

time_sensitive_events.description: Events that trigger at specific times/turns

debug_mode.description: Whether debug information should be shown

dual_mode.description: Compatibility flag for dual mode handling

pending_instruction_hints.description: Queued instruction hints for the LLM

world_events.description: Living-world event bundle persisted for story continuity

game_state.description: Legacy nested game_state container for compatibility
